creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text: Is the 'svn rm www/node' and 'svn mv www/node7 www/node' atomic, or will there be a period with no www/node port (albeit brief)? I am almost tempted to say I will just submit an update to www/node to move it from 6.9.1 to 7.2.1 (the latest), and then we can remove www/node7 after that?
